message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

package "com" {
  package "yuhao" {
    package "pigdice" {
      class main {
        □ myDices: PairOfDice
        □ rbDices: PairOfDice
        □ myScore: Text
        □ rbScore: Text
        □ rollBt: ImageView
        □ disBt: ImageView
        □ resBt: ImageView
        □ win: ImageView
        □ winBG: ImageView
        --
        - main(String[] args): void
        - rollBtPress(MouseEvent event): void
        - disBtPress(MouseEvent event): void
        - resBtPress(MouseEvent event): void
        - reStart(): void
        - checkWinner(): void
        - playEnd(): void
        - checkButton(int signal): void
        - inButton(ImageView button,int X): void
        - outButton(ImageView button): void
        - roRes(ImageView button): void
      }

      class PairOfDice {
        △ rootDV: Group
        △ counter: int
        □ dL: Dice
        □ dR: Dice
        □ score: score
        --
        ▲ PairOfDice(int TorB,int x,int y)
        ▲ getScore(): int
        ▲ setZero(): void
        ▲ createDices(): void
        ▲ resetDices(): void
        ▲ rollDices(): int
        ▲ autoRollDs(): void
      }

      class Dice {
        △ rootDV: Group
        △ randTime: int
        □ mainDV: ImageView
        □ hideDV: ImageView
        □ LorR: int
        □ TorB: int
        □ randNum: int
        □ randTX: int
        □ randTY: int
        □ randR: double
        □ ds01: DropShadow
        --
        ▲ Dice (int LorR, int TorB)
        ▲ getNum(): int
        ▲ createDice(): void
        ▲ resetDice(): void
        ▲ getRandAll(): void
        ▲ startRoll(int anotherTime): void
        ▲ autoRoll(List <Integer> list, int counter): void
      }
    }
  }
}

class Application {
  ● start(Stage primaryStage): void
}

main o-- PairOfDice
main --|> Application

note right of main : 驱动图形界面，界面交互逻辑
note bottom of PairOfDice : 成对骰子，驱动单个骰子
note bottom of Dice : 单个骰子，定义随机投掷方法

@enduml
```
